name: BENCHMARK BANKSHARES INC
business: Benchmark Bankshares Inc, through its subsidiary Benchmark Community Bank, provides commercial banking services including loans and deposits to customers in Southside Virginia. The bank offers loan types such as commercial, consumer, real estate construction, and real estate mortgage loans. The bank's primary funding sources are deposits and it serves the local community.
sellsTo: Individuals and businesses in Southside Virginia

catalysts.event: Plans to expand current lending efforts in South Boston/Halifax County and construct a new branch location in Blackstone, Virginia
catalysts.sentence: With this in mind, the Bank has made plans to expand its current lending efforts in South Boston/Halifax County while also constructing a new branch location in Blackstone, Virginia.
